PathOfBuilding.Notes:
^4CHANGES FOR 3.28:
Earthshatter: Now has an Effectiveness of Added Damage of 158%-329% at gem levels 1-20 (previously 171%-393%). (To simulate the nerf pre patch this is a level 15 Earthshatter)
Overexertion now grants Supported Attacks deal 7-10% more Damage for each Warcry Exerting them (previously 12-18%), and Supported Attacks deal 10-14% more Damage if Exerted (previously 10% at all gem levels). No longer displays as supporting Triggered Attack skills which cannot be Exerted, such as Shockwave Support. (To simulate the nerf pre patch this is a level 1 Overexertion)
Autoexertion now has a Mana Reservation of 20% (previously 15%). (To simulate the nerf there are 2 ways to go about this. The first way is to just take out infernal cry from your autoexert setup and the second way is to take the Cannibalistic Rite node along with the 12% increased mana reservation of skills mastery.)
^2YOUR IDEAL 7 LINK CORRUPTION SUPPORT WILL LIKELY BE: ^xE05030FOR RED GEMS: Endurange Charge on Melee Stun, for 24% more damage, probably best in slot Fortify Fist of War Chance to Bleed Lifetap Rage^7 ^xE05030Ruthless^7
^2FOR GREEN GEMS: Close Combat Culling Strike Faster Attacks Impale
^x7070FF^xD02090^x70FF70^6Leveling Regex:
-[rgb]-.-|r-r-|-r-r|r-.-r|r-r|g-r|r-g|nne|g-g-r^7^7^xC8C8C8
